title: Grofers is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Grofers is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a Full Stack Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
